commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs a contributor-side code fix, real behavior proof, and maintainer security/compatibility judgment rather than an automated cleanup close or repair lane.; Needs attention: A concrete requester-identity trust bug remains in the WhatsApp side of the patch, and the security-sensitive runtime path lacks real behavior proof.; Review finding: [P1] Honor requesterSourceProvider for WhatsApp reactions — ex... (sha=623957107562591b73a71d12288c96899920338a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR carries trusted requester identity through Discord/WhatsApp message actions, Gateway/MCP loopback, CLI, and agent tool paths so privileged Discord moderation/admin actions require trusted sender context.

PR surface: Source +491, Tests +769. Total +1260 across 40 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main exposes Discord moderation actions but the existing trusted-requester predicate omits them, and the PR diff shows the remaining WhatsApp cross-source predicate issue without needing a live transport run.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs a contributor-side code fix, real behavior proof, and maintainer security/compatibility judgment rather than an automated cleanup close or repair lane.

target.title: fix(discord): require sender context for moderation actions
target.body:
## Summary

- Require trusted Discord requester context before privileged Discord moderation and guild-admin message actions can use requester identity.
- Carry requester identity through CLI, MCP loopback, and gateway message-action paths without relying on client-controlled sender headers.
- Keep deliverable channel routing on the routeable provider while carrying non-deliverable requester source providers separately.
- Bind sender-scoped MCP loopback tokens to the current request context so requester identity cannot be replayed into another session/channel envelope.
- Strip `toolContext.requesterSourceProvider` from non-admin gateway `message.action` callers so requester source trust stays coupled to server-authorized sender identity.

## Compatibility / scope notes

- This intentionally fails closed for tool-driven Discord privileged actions from non-Discord requester contexts. Existing cross-channel automation that asks a Discord guild-admin/moderation action to run without a trusted Discord requester or trusted local owner context will now receive an error instead of executing without trusted sender attribution.
- Removed unrelated heartbeat and Gateway WS cosmetic/test hunks from the PR. The `src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.model-config.test.ts` metadata fixture remains because the broad proof suite fails without an explicit manifest metadata snapshot for those PDF model-config assertions.

## Verification

- `git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.mjs' | xargs -r ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel-react-action.test.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.security.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.plugin-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/workspace-templates.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.model-config.test.ts src/crestodian/rescue-message.test.ts src/tasks/task-flow-registry.store.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord privileged moderation and guild-admin message actions now require a trusted Discord requester or trusted local owner context, and Gateway/MCP paths no longer let non-admin callers spoof or replay requester sender identity across channel/session boundaries.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on Linux/UTC, Node `v22.22.2`, pnpm `11.2.2`, branch `discord-action-sender-guard`, exact PR head `623957107562591b73a71d12288c96899920338a` rebased on `origin/main` `e0018382eb00b8f2bad6ada8ee5f66956ac9cc21`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.mjs' | xargs -r ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel-react-action.test.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.security.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.plugin-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/workspace-templates.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.model-config.test.ts src/crestodian/rescue-message.test.ts src/tasks/task-flow-registry.store.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix: Copied terminal output from the local run on the exact PR head:
```text
$ node --version
v22.22.2
$ pnpm --version
11.2.2
$ git rev-parse HEAD
623957107562591b73a71d12288c96899920338a
$ git rev-parse origin/main
e0018382eb00b8f2bad6ada8ee5f66956ac9cc21

$ git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.mjs' | xargs -r ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1
Checking formatting...
All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 140ms on 40 files using 1 threads.

$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
(exit 0; no diagnostics)

$ git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
(exit 0; no diagnostics)

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/channel-react-action.test.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.security.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.plugin-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/workspace-templates.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.model-config.test.ts src/crestodian/rescue-message.test.ts src/tasks/task-flow-registry.store.test.ts
Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 10 passed (10) [unit-fast-fake-timers shard]
Test Files 14 passed (14); Tests 312 passed (312) [gateway shard]
Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 22 passed (22) [infra shard]
Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 8 passed (8) [tasks shard]
Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 182 passed (182) [auto-reply shard]
Test Files 5 passed (5); Tests 189 passed (189) [agents shard]
Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 121 passed (121) [e2e shard]
Test Files 3 passed (3); Tests 142 passed (142) [discord extension shard]
Test Files 2 passed (2); Tests 29 passed (29) [whatsapp extension shard]
Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 3 passed (3) [channels shard]
[test] passed 10 Vitest shards in 143.26s
```

Observed result after fix: Gateway/server tests show non-admin `message.action` calls strip `requesterSenderId`, `senderIsOwner`, and spoofed `toolContext.requesterSourceProvider`; outbound runner tests show normal gateway actions stay least-privilege while plugin-declared trusted requester actions request `operator.admin` plus `operator.write`; Discord action tests show prompt/tool-driven privileged moderation rejects non-Discord or missing requester context while trusted Discord requester and local owner paths still work. MCP loopback tests also reject sender-scoped token replay across both different providers and same-provider session/channel/message context changes, and WhatsApp reaction tests preserve trusted requester identity only for same-source WhatsApp reactions.

What was not tested: No live Discord guild moderation command was executed against a real Discord bot/guild. Fresh autoreview was attempted on `623957107562591b73a71d12288c96899920338a`, but it produced no result after 15 minutes and was stopped; local tests, typecheck, format, and diff checks above passed on the exact PR head.
